query: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN INSERT INTO public.profiles (id, full_name) VALUES (NEW.id, COALESCE(NEW.raw_user_meta_data->>'full_name', '')); RETURN NEW; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS on_auth_user_created ON auth.users; CREATE TRIGGER on_auth_user_created AFTER INSERT ON auth.users FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user(); CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.update_profiles_updated_at() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN NEW.updated_at = NOW(); RETURN NEW; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS profiles_updated_at ON public.profiles; CREATE TRIGGER profiles_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.profiles FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION public.update_profiles_updated_at();
